entities.name: SOIL WATERLOGGING
entities.description: The saturation of soil with water, which can negatively impact crop growth and yield

entities.name: NUTRIENT LEACHING
entities.description: The loss of water-soluble plant nutrients from the soil due to excessive rain

entities.name: EXCESSIVE HUMIDITY
entities.description: High levels of moisture in low-altitude areas

entities.name: DROUGHT

entities.name: PRECIPITATION VARIABILITY
entities.description: The increasing variability and intensity of rainfall in Sub-Saharan Africa

entities.name: SUB-SAHARAN AFRICA
entities.description: The region characterized by rainfed agriculture and precipitation variability

entities.name: WEST AFRICA
entities.description: The region containing lowlands and facing risks of drought

entities.description: A specific area where maize, millet, sorghum, and rice are grown and soil waterlogging is frequent

entities.name: LOWLANDS
entities.description: Low-altitude lands prone to excessive humidity and soil waterlogging

entities.name: RAINFED AGRICULTURE
entities.description: Agricultural production that relies solely on rainfall
